articles.title: Oil Holds Biggest Gain in a Month on Standoff in US-Iran Talks
articles.summary: Oil steadied after its biggest gain in about a month, as uncertainty about the state of US-Iran peace talks raised the risk that energy flows from the Persian Gulf could be curtailed for longer.

articles.title: Aluminum Advances to Four-Year High on Tighter Global Market

articles.title: China Robotics Firms Line Up IPOs to Pitch Next Phase of AI
